48:
<Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, right? I hear you get around! I'm an adventurer myself. The name's Kakamehi.
...Hey, we can't all have an interesting name like yours. Look, I can cut you in on something fair, if you're interested.
